title: Systeme.io Free Plan: How to Sell Digital Products with Zero Budget
excerpt: Are you tired of expensive software subscriptions like ClickFunnels ($97/month) or Teachable (10% transaction fees) eating into your early profits? Systeme.io is the ultimate free alternative.
author: Med Koudi
metaTitle: Systeme.io Free Plan: Sell Digital Products with Zero Budget
metaDescription: Learn how to use the Systeme.io free plan to launch and sell your digital products without any upfront costs. The ultimate guide for beginners.
metaKeywords: systeme.io, digital products, free marketing tools, sales funnels
content:
Are you tired of expensive software subscriptions like ClickFunnels ($97/month) or Teachable (10% transaction fees) eating into your early profits? [Systeme.io](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535) is the ultimate free alternative for solopreneurs to sell digital products with absolutely zero budget.

## What is Systeme.io?

[Systeme.io](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535) is an all-in-one marketing platform designed specifically for solopreneurs, digital marketers, and course creators. It replaces the need to piece together multiple expensive tools by combining funnel building, email marketing, and course hosting into a single dashboard. This streamlined approach allows you to manage your entire online business efficiently from one centralized place.

### Step 1: Claim Free Account

The platform offers a truly [forever-free plan](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535) that requires no credit card to get started. On this $0/month tier, you receive up to 2,000 contacts, three sales funnels, and unlimited email sending capabilities.

> #### Ready to launch your business?
> [Get Started for Free](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535)
> No credit card required

### Step 2: Setup Your Product

To begin, navigate to the "Funnels" tab within your [Systeme.io dashboard](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535) and create a new payment page. Select "Digital Product" as your specific offer type so the system properly categorizes what you are selling. From there, you can easily name your eBook, prompt pack, or digital file and establish your pricing structure.

### Step 3: Build Checkout Page

[Systeme.io](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535) features an intuitive drag-and-drop page builder that makes customizing your checkout experience completely seamless. You can easily integrate major payment gateways like Stripe or PayPal to process customer transactions securely. The best part is that [Systeme.io](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535) takes exactly 0% in additional transaction fees on your sales across all plans.

### Step 4: Automate Delivery Emails

To ensure immediate file delivery, you must set up an automation rule connected to your payment page. Create a rule that triggers instantly when a customer completes their purchase. You can configure this automation to apply a customer tag and automatically send an email containing the digital download link or file attachment using the [Systeme.io email marketing engine](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535).

## Start Selling Today

You can launch your first digital product today for $0 without needing any advanced coding or technical skills. Create a [forever-free Systeme.io account](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535) and build your first checkout page today to start generating risk-free income.

[Create Your Free Account Now](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535)

title: How to Automate Pinterest Affiliate Links Using Make.com
excerpt: Pinterest is an absolute powerhouse for driving organic traffic to your digital products and affiliate offers, but keeping up with the platform's voracious appetite for fresh content can quickly lead to solopreneur burnout.
author: Med Koudi
metaTitle: Automate Pinterest Affiliate Links with Make.com | Grow With Med
metaDescription: Discover how to automate your Pinterest affiliate marketing strategy using Make.com. Save time and drive massive organic traffic on autopilot.
metaKeywords: pinterest automation, make.com, affiliate marketing, passive income
content:
Pinterest is an absolute powerhouse for driving organic traffic to your digital products and affiliate offers, but keeping up with the platform's voracious appetite for fresh content can quickly lead to solopreneur burnout. Instead of manually uploading pins every day, introducing [Make.com](https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=growwithmed) into your workflow is the best way to put your entire Pinterest marketing strategy on complete autopilot.

## Why You Need to Automate Pinterest in 2026

In 2026, the Pinterest algorithm rewards extreme consistency above almost everything else, making it nearly impossible to scale your passive income if you are relying on manual effort. Automating your pinning schedule ensures your affiliate links and digital product funnels receive a steady stream of traffic 24/7 without you having to sacrifice your time. It bridges the gap between working inside your business and effortlessly scaling it.

## The Tools You Need

To build this passive income machine, you only need three core components in your tech stack. First, you need a free Pinterest Business account to access the developer tools and analytics. Second, you need your raw affiliate links or digital product URLs ready to be promoted. Finally, you need a [Make.com account](https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=growwithmed) to serve as the central automation engine that ties everything together.

## Step-by-Step Make.com Setup

### Setting the Trigger

Start by creating a new scenario in [Make.com](https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=growwithmed) and adding a Google Sheets module as your initial trigger. Configure the module to "Watch Rows" so that whenever you add a new line containing your pin data—such as a new image link and your affiliate URL—Make.com automatically kicks off the workflow.

### Mapping the Data

Inside your Google Sheet, organize your columns clearly: Image URL, Pin Title, Pin Description, and Destination URL. As the data is pulled into [Make.com](https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=growwithmed), you will map these specific spreadsheet cells directly into the workflow, ensuring every automated pin gets the exact aesthetic and SEO-optimized copy you planned.

### Creating the Pinterest Action module

Click the plus button in [Make.com](https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=growwithmed), search for the Pinterest integration, and select the "Create a Pin" action. Connect your Pinterest account and map the fields you pulled from Google Sheets into this module. You will insert the spreadsheet's Image URL for the media, your custom title, the affiliate link for the destination URL, and choose the specific board where the pin should be published.

## Best Practices to Avoid Spam Filters

Pinterest aggressively combats spam, and setting up an automation that blasts 50 pins in a single hour will instantly trigger their shadowban filters and potentially get your account suspended. To avoid getting flagged, you must pace out your automation by distributing your activity evenly throughout the day to mimic genuine human behavior. Limit your automated posts to a safe velocity, such as scheduling 5 to 10 strategically timed pins spread out across a 12-hour window.

## Conclusion

By setting up this simple but powerful integration, you can easily save 10 to 15 hours per week that would otherwise be wasted on repetitive manual pinning. Instead of grinding out individual uploads, you can focus your energy on creating higher-converting digital products and securing better affiliate partnerships.

> #### Ready to automate your Pinterest growth?
> [Get Started with Make.com](https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=growwithmed)
> Build your first workflow for free

Sign up for a [free Make.com account today](https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=growwithmed) and build your first automated Pinterest workflow to start driving passive traffic while you sleep!

title: Does SEOWriting AI Actually Rank on Google in 2026? (Honest Test)
excerpt: In 2026, the digital landscape is flooded with skepticism surrounding AI-generated content, with many creators wondering if Google actively penalizes AI articles.
author: Med Koudi
metaTitle: Does SEOWriting AI Rank on Google? 2026 Honest Test
metaDescription: We tested SEOWriting AI to see if its content actually ranks on Google in 2026. Read our honest review and results before you buy.
metaKeywords: seowriting ai, ai content ranking, google seo, ai writing tools
content:
In 2026, the digital landscape is flooded with skepticism surrounding AI-generated content, with many creators wondering if Google actively penalizes AI articles. While Google explicitly states that they reward high-quality content regardless of how it is produced, the reality of algorithm updates has left many niche site builders hesitant to rely on automated writing tools. To cut through the noise and industry speculation, I decided to put this to the test on my own site. This case study details my exact process, from keyword selection to generation, and provides a transparent look at the actual Google Search Console results I achieved using [SEOWriting AI](https://seowriting.ai?fp_ref=koudi-mohamed75).

## What is SEOWriting AI?

[SEOWriting AI](https://seowriting.ai?fp_ref=koudi-mohamed75) is an advanced artificial intelligence writing assistant specifically engineered to create highly optimized, ready-to-publish content for bloggers and affiliate marketers. Unlike generic chatbots, it focuses entirely on search engine optimization, integrating real-time keyword data, NLP (Natural Language Processing) terms, and structural best practices into every draft. The platform goes beyond mere text generation by handling the entire content creation workflow from start to finish.

One of its most powerful features is the 1-Click Blog Post generator, which allows users to instantly create comprehensive articles complete with auto-generated images and embedded YouTube videos. Furthermore, [SEOWriting AI](https://seowriting.ai?fp_ref=koudi-mohamed75) features a seamless WordPress integration. By installing their dedicated plugin, users can connect their WordPress dashboard directly to the AI platform. This allows you to auto-publish or schedule articles, complete with optimized meta titles, meta descriptions, and formatted headings, without ever having to copy and paste text between tabs.

Additionally, the tool includes a built-in Humanizer feature designed to bypass AI detection and make the text read more naturally. This system preserves crucial SEO elements, such as target keywords and formatting structure, while adjusting the cadence and tone to sound less robotic.

## My Testing Strategy

To properly test if [SEOWriting AI](https://seowriting.ai?fp_ref=koudi-mohamed75) content could survive Google's rigorous 2026 algorithms, I needed a highly specific testing strategy that isolated the AI's capabilities. I chose to target a low-competition, long-tail keyword in the B2B SaaS niche. Targeting a massive, highly competitive term would require extensive backlink building, which would skew the results of an on-page content test. By selecting a high-intent, low-volume keyword, I could observe how the content ranked based purely on its topical relevance and semantic structure.

Before generating the article, I analyzed the top three ranking pages for my target keyword to identify content gaps. I noted that the current ranking articles were relatively thin, lacking visual elements and deep technical explanations. My strategy was to use [SEOWriting AI](https://seowriting.ai?fp_ref=koudi-mohamed75) to create a hyper-comprehensive, 1,500-word piece that aggressively addressed user intent while strictly adhering to Google's E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness) guidelines. I deliberately avoided building any new backlinks to this specific URL during the test to ensure that any movement in the SERPs was solely attributed to the AI-generated content.

## The Article Generation Process

Generating the article required carefully tuning the platform's settings rather than just typing in a prompt and clicking enter. Inside the [SEOWriting AI dashboard](https://seowriting.ai?fp_ref=koudi-mohamed75), I inputted my primary long-tail keyword and pasted a list of secondary NLP keywords I wanted the system to naturally weave into the text. I set the tone of voice to "Professional yet Conversational" to match the target audience, ensuring the language did not sound overly academic or stiff.

For the visual elements, I utilized the platform's auto image generation feature to create custom, relevant images for each H2 section. I also enabled the YouTube integration, instructing the AI to find and embed a highly relevant video near the top of the article to increase user dwell time—a crucial ranking factor in 2026. Before finalizing, I activated the Humanizer tool on a medium setting to refine the text's flow and add stylistic variation to the sentence structures.

Once the settings were dialed in, I used the WordPress integration to push the draft directly to my site. The plugin automatically populated the excerpt field with an optimized meta description, formatted all the headers, and set the featured image.

> #### Ready to scale your content production?
> [Try SEOWriting AI Today](https://seowriting.ai?fp_ref=koudi-mohamed75)
> Use code GROWWITHMED for an exclusive discount

## The Results (Traffic & Rankings)

The performance data over the following weeks provided a definitive answer regarding how Google treats properly formatted AI content. Within 48 hours of publishing, the article was successfully crawled and indexed by Google. This immediate indexing is a strong initial indicator that Google did not view the content as low-quality or spam.

Over the first two weeks, my Google Search Console (GSC) dashboard showed a steady climb in impressions as the article bounced between page three and page two of the search results. By week three, the article successfully broke onto the first page for the primary long-tail keyword. The GSC screenshots from this period showed a sharp upward trajectory in both impressions and a corresponding increase in organic clicks.

Interestingly, during a period of moderate algorithm volatility, the article experienced slight fluctuations, occasionally dropping a few positions before stabilizing again. This mirrors the behavior of newly published human content as Google tests user engagement metrics. Ultimately, the test proved that AI-generated content can absolutely rank and drive targeted traffic when it is strategically structured, visually engaging, and highly relevant to the searcher's intent.

## Pros and Cons

While the results were impressive, treating any AI tool as a flawless magic bullet is a mistake. Here is an honest breakdown of where the platform excels and where it falls short.

### What SEOWriting AI Does Well:

*   **Unmatched Speed:** The 1-click generation and direct WordPress publishing save hours of formatting and manual data entry.
*   **SEO Optimization:** The tool reliably integrates target keywords and NLP terms without resorting to unnatural keyword stuffing.
*   **Comprehensive Formatting:** Automatically generating relevant images, embedding videos, and structuring markdown headers creates a polished final product.
*   **Cost Efficiency:** It drastically reduces the overhead costs associated with hiring freelance writers for high-volume content projects.

### Where Human Editing is Still Needed:

*   **Nuance and Voice:** While the Humanizer tool helps, the AI can still lack the unique personal anecdotes and brand voice that build deep trust with an audience.
*   **Fact-Checking:** AI models can still hallucinate or present outdated statistics, meaning a human editor must verify all factual claims before publishing.
*   **Overly Structured Formatting:** Sometimes the AI relies too heavily on predictable bulleted lists, requiring a human to break up the text into more engaging, varied paragraphs.
*   **Advanced Strategy:** The tool cannot build backlinks or perform complex off-page SEO, which remain necessary for ranking in highly competitive niches.

## The Final Verdict

For solopreneurs, affiliate marketers, and niche site builders operating in 2026, [SEOWriting AI](https://seowriting.ai?fp_ref=koudi-mohamed75) is an incredibly powerful asset that is absolutely worth the investment. The platform bridges the gap between raw AI text generation and technical SEO, allowing you to scale your content production without sacrificing on-page optimization.

However, it is crucial to understand that it is a co-pilot, not an autopilot. To achieve sustainable, long-term rankings, you must bring your own strategic keyword research to the table and spend at least 10 to 15 minutes editing the generated drafts. By injecting your own expertise, verifying facts, and adding personal insights, you can create hybrid content that ranks easily while maintaining the trust of your human readers.

Ready to scale your niche site and dominate low-competition keywords? [Try SEOWriting AI today](https://seowriting.ai?fp_ref=koudi-mohamed75) and use the exclusive promo code **GROWWITHMED** at checkout to get a discount on your subscription!

title: How to Turn YouTube Videos Into Blog Posts Automatically
excerpt: The modern creator economy demands omnipresence, but the reality of being a solopreneur means your time is strictly limited. Transform your video content into polished articles automatically.
author: Med Koudi
metaTitle: Turn YouTube Videos Into Blog Posts Automatically | Grow With Med
metaDescription: Learn how to automatically repurpose your YouTube videos into polished, SEO-optimized blog posts to maximize your content reach.
metaKeywords: youtube to blog, content repurposing, ai writing, video to text
content:
The modern creator economy demands omnipresence, but the reality of being a solopreneur means your time is strictly limited. You pour hours into scripting, filming, and editing a high-quality YouTube video, only for its lifespan to be dictated by the unpredictable whims of a recommendation algorithm. Smart creators understand the power of content repurposing—taking that single hero asset and distributing it across multiple platforms to maximize its ROI. However, the traditional process of turning a video into a readable, SEO-optimized blog post is notoriously painful. Fortunately, AI has completely revolutionized this workflow, allowing you to transform your video content into polished articles automatically, without the soul-crushing manual labor.

## Why Every YouTuber Needs a Blog

Relying solely on YouTube to distribute your content and generate revenue is a fundamentally flawed business model for long-term solopreneurs. When you build exclusively on a third-party platform, you are effectively renting digital real estate. A sudden algorithm shift, an unwarranted community strike, or a change in monetization policies can instantly derail your income. Building your own self-hosted blog ensures that you own your audience, your traffic, and your brand equity, completely independent of big tech's shifting priorities.

Beyond platform independence, a blog allows you to capture highly lucrative Google search traffic that your videos simply cannot reach. While YouTube acts as the world's second-largest search engine, Google's primary search index still heavily favors comprehensive, structured text over video content for informational queries. By converting your videos into detailed articles, you are double-dipping into the internet's largest traffic pools.

Finally, repurposing your videos into blog posts mathematically doubles your affiliate link exposure. On YouTube, your affiliate links are buried in the description box, requiring viewers to proactively click away from the video player to find them. In a well-structured blog post, contextual affiliate links can be seamlessly woven directly into the narrative of the content. This native placement significantly increases click-through rates, turning a single piece of content into a multi-channel passive income machine.

## Enter Blogify AI

When most creators attempt to automate their writing process, they instinctively turn to ChatGPT. However, using standard generative AI models for video repurposing creates immense friction. ChatGPT requires you to manually extract the video transcript, format it, feed it into the prompt box while battling strict token limits, and spend significant time engineering the perfect prompt to ensure the output actually reads like a blog post rather than a robotic summary.

Enter [Blogify AI](https://blogify.ai?fpr=growwithmed), a platform purpose-built specifically to solve this exact problem for content creators. Instead of juggling transcripts and prompts, Blogify bypasses the manual extraction process entirely by pulling data directly from the live video URL. It uses advanced natural language processing to analyze the video's core concepts, discard the conversational filler, and structure a deeply optimized, highly readable article in under a minute.

> #### Ready to repurpose your content?
> [Try Blogify AI Today](https://blogify.ai?fpr=growwithmed)
> Turn videos into articles in seconds

## The 3-Step Repurposing Workflow

Transforming your video content into a traffic-generating asset no longer requires an afternoon of editing. With [Blogify AI](https://blogify.ai?fpr=growwithmed), the entire process is condensed into a streamlined, three-step workflow that requires zero technical expertise.

### Step 1: Pasting the YouTube Link

The process begins inside the intuitive [Blogify dashboard](https://blogify.ai?fpr=growwithmed). Instead of downloading files, you simply navigate to YouTube, copy the URL of your target video, and paste it directly into Blogify's conversion engine. The platform is robust enough to handle standard videos, long-form podcast episodes, and even webinar recordings.

### Step 2: Tweaking the SEO Settings

Before the final article is generated, Blogify allows you to customize the output to align perfectly with your brand's aesthetic and SEO strategy. You can select from over 75 different languages, allowing you to easily localize your English videos for international markets. You can also dictate the specific tone of voice—whether you want the post to sound casual, strictly professional, or highly informative.

### Step 3: Publishing automatically

The true power of Blogify lies in its seamless distribution capabilities. Rather than copying and pasting the generated text into your content management system, you can leverage the dedicated Blogify WordPress plugin. By connecting your site via an access token, you can push the fully formatted, SEO-optimized article directly to your WordPress or Blogger site with a single click.

## How to Monetize Your Repurposed Posts

Traffic is only half the equation; the ultimate goal of a solopreneur blog is automated monetization. Repurposing your videos gives you a blank canvas to strategically place affiliate links where they hold the most contextual power. With the introduction of Blogify 5.0, the platform has rolled out an incredibly advanced Affiliate Link Automation feature that handles this monetization process for you.

Blogify's AI actively analyzes the topic, context, and sentiment of your generated blog post to identify where product recommendations would naturally fit. It then automatically searches its partnered networks and embeds high-paying, relevant affiliate links directly into the text. This allows you to maintain the "quiet luxury" and high-end aesthetic of your brand while ensuring every piece of content operates as a highly optimized revenue vehicle.

## Conclusion

Building a successful, multi-platform digital business does not mean working 80-hour weeks or sacrificing your lifestyle to the content mill. It means working smarter, not harder, by leveraging advanced AI tools to stretch your existing content as far as computationally possible. By automating the transition from video to text, you can secure Google search traffic, own your audience, and drastically scale your affiliate revenue without ever having to type out a manual transcription again.

Stop letting your high-quality videos die in the YouTube archives. [Start a free trial with Blogify today](https://blogify.ai?fpr=growwithmed) to instantly turn your best video into a lucrative, SEO-optimized blog post in seconds!

title: Mangools vs Ahrefs: Best Cheap Keyword Tool for Beginner Bloggers?
excerpt: If you are tired of being priced out of essential SEO data, it is time to look at Mangools. This budget-friendly underdog delivers the core metrics you need to rank on Google.
author: Med Koudi
metaTitle: Mangools vs Ahrefs: Best Cheap Keyword Tool 2026
metaDescription: Is Mangools a viable cheap alternative to Ahrefs for beginner bloggers? We compare features, pricing, and data accuracy.
metaKeywords: mangools vs ahrefs, keyword research tools, cheap seo tools, blogging for beginners
content:
When you start your journey as a solopreneur blogger, every piece of advice points you toward investing in a premium keyword research tool. Without fail, the industry consensus will tell you to buy Ahrefs. However, while Ahrefs is undeniably powerful, its steep subscription cost can instantly evaporate a beginner's budget before their blog even earns its first dollar. If you are tired of being priced out of essential SEO data, it is time to look at Mangools. This budget-friendly underdog delivers the core metrics you need to rank on Google without forcing you to choose between your business software and your grocery bill.

## Ahrefs: The Industry Standard

There is a reason Ahrefs is considered the gold standard for enterprise SEO agencies and massive media publishers. It boasts one of the most comprehensive backlink databases on the internet, highly accurate search volume metrics, and advanced features like content gap analysis and AI Overview tracking.

However, this immense power comes with an equally immense price tag. As of 2026, the standard Ahrefs "Lite" plan starts at a steep $129 per month. While they recently introduced a highly restricted $29 "Starter" tier, it acts mostly as an introductory teaser—locking you out of advanced features and heavily limiting your monthly credits. For a bootstrapped beginner blogger who just needs reliable keyword data to write high-converting articles, paying over $1,500 a year for enterprise-level analytics is massive overkill.

## Mangools: The Beginner's Secret Weapon

Instead of paying for hundreds of complex features you will never use, Mangools strips SEO down to exactly what a solopreneur needs: finding low-competition keywords that are actually possible to rank for. It is a suite of five incredibly intuitive, beginner-friendly tools wrapped into one affordable subscription. Rather than overwhelming you with endless spreadsheets of raw data, Mangools visually presents exactly what you need to know to make profitable content decisions.

> #### Ready to find low-competition keywords?
> [Try Mangools for Free](https://mangools.com#a6930e5556aee08cf63eeb754)
> 10-day free trial • No credit card required

## Head-to-Head Comparison

### Keyword Research

The core of Ahrefs is its Keyword Explorer, which uses complex algorithms and backlink data to calculate keyword difficulty. It is incredibly accurate but can be dense to navigate.

Mangools counters this with **KWFinder**, arguably the most user-friendly keyword tool on the market. When you type in a seed keyword, KWFinder generates a clean, visually appealing list of related terms alongside a color-coded Keyword Difficulty (KD) score ranging from 0 to 100. Green means easy, red means hard. It is perfectly designed for beginner bloggers who need to quickly identify low-hanging fruit without needing a degree in data science.

### Backlink Analysis and Rank Tracking

Ahrefs dominates the backlink space, allowing you to deeply audit your competitors' link profiles to reverse-engineer their success. Its rank tracker is similarly robust, offering precise daily updates across multiple geographic locations.

Mangools offers its own streamlined versions: **LinkMiner** for backlinks and **SERPWatcher** for rank tracking. While LinkMiner's database is not as exhaustive as Ahrefs, it provides plenty of data for a beginner to analyze a competitor's top links. SERPWatcher simplifies rank tracking by giving you a single "Dominance Index" score, allowing you to see your blog's overall organic growth at a glance instead of obsessing over daily micro-fluctuations.

### User Interface & Ease of Use

If you log into Ahrefs as a beginner, the sheer volume of graphs, charts, and technical jargon can trigger immediate analysis paralysis. The learning curve is notoriously steep.

Mangools, on the other hand, was built specifically to be less overwhelming. The user interface is bright, clean, and highly intuitive. You can seamlessly click between KWFinder, SERPWatcher, and LinkMiner without ever feeling lost in the dashboard. For a solopreneur who wants to spend their time writing and building their aesthetic brand rather than studying software manuals, Mangools offers a frictionless experience.

## Pricing Breakdown

The true deciding factor for a beginner is the cost. If you opt for the Ahrefs Lite plan, you are committing to $129 per month, which equals $1,548 per year.

Mangools offers an "Entry" plan starting at $29 per month. However, if you choose their annual billing option, the price drops significantly, allowing you to secure the software for around $226.80 for the entire year.

By choosing Mangools over Ahrefs, a solopreneur blogger saves over $1,300 per year. That is capital you can directly reinvest into purchasing a premium WordPress theme, buying better hosting, or hiring a freelance writer to help scale your content production.

## Conclusion

If you are running a massive digital marketing agency or an ecommerce brand generating six figures a month, Ahrefs is the required industry standard. However, for creators, solopreneurs, and bloggers earning under $1,000 a month, Mangools is the undisputed winner. It provides all the necessary data to find profitable keywords and track your growth without the crippling price tag or the overwhelming learning curve.

Stop guessing what your audience is searching for and start writing content that actually ranks! [Start your 10-day free trial of Mangools today](https://mangools.com#a6930e5556aee08cf63eeb754) and find your first low-competition keyword in minutes!

title: How to Use vidIQ to Grow a Small YouTube Channel Fast
excerpt: Are you pouring hours into filming and editing YouTube videos, only to be met with single-digit views? Stop leaving your YouTube success up to chance.
author: Med Koudi
metaTitle: How to Use vidIQ to Grow a Small YouTube Channel Fast
metaDescription: Step-by-step guide on using vidIQ to optimize your small YouTube channel for massive growth and more views.
metaKeywords: vidiq tutorial, youtube growth, video optimization, small channel tips
content:
Are you pouring hours into filming and editing YouTube videos, only to be met with single-digit views and stagnant subscriber growth? You are not alone, but the truth is that YouTube growth is not about waiting to get "lucky" with the algorithm. It is about treating your channel like a data-driven solopreneur business and giving the platform the exact metrics and signals it wants to see.

## Why Small Channels Fail

Small creators often fail because they treat YouTube like a personal diary rather than the world's second-largest search engine. They spend immense effort creating high-quality content that absolutely nobody is actively searching for. If you do not validate your video topics with hard data before you press record, you are essentially gambling with your time and stunting your channel's potential from day one.

## Getting Started with vidIQ

To remove the guesswork from your content strategy, you need to equip your browser with [vidIQ](https://vidiq.com/Koudi26). This AI-powered YouTube optimization tool integrates directly into your YouTube interface, providing real-time analytics, personalized insights, and comprehensive SEO data for every video on the platform. It is the ultimate unfair advantage for creators looking to scale quickly and monetize their audience.

> #### Ready to explode your YouTube views?
> [Install vidIQ for Free](https://vidiq.com/Koudi26)
> Join 10M+ creators growing on YouTube

## Strategy 1: Finding Keyword Opportunities Before Filming

Before you ever write a script, you must validate your idea using the [vidIQ Keyword Research tool](https://vidiq.com/Koudi26). When you type a potential video topic into the search bar, vidIQ instantly reveals two critical metrics: Search Volume (how many people are looking for this exact phrase each month) and Competition Score (how many other videos are already competing for it). Your goal as a small channel is to find the "sweet spot"—a keyword with a high search volume but a distinctly low competition score. By targeting these specific gaps in the market, you guarantee that there is an audience waiting for your video, making it significantly easier to rank on the first page of search results.

## Strategy 2: Analyzing Competitor Tags

One of the fastest ways to grow a small channel is by ethically siphoning traffic from larger creators in your specific niche. With the [vidIQ Competitors Tool](https://vidiq.com/Koudi26), you can instantly pull up the hidden metrics of any top-performing video, including the exact tags and keywords the creator used to rank. By exporting these high-converting tags with a single click and strategically integrating the relevant ones into your own video's metadata, you increase the likelihood of your content appearing in the "Suggested Videos" sidebar right next to your biggest competitors. This allows you to capitalize on their existing momentum and direct their audience straight to your channel.

## Strategy 3: Using the Daily Ideas AI Feature

Writer's block can cripple a creator's consistency, but [vidIQ](https://vidiq.com/Koudi26) solves this completely with its Daily Ideas AI feature. Instead of forcing you to brainstorm blindly, this tool actively scans your channel's historical performance, audience preferences, and broader industry trends to generate highly personalized video concepts. It goes a step further by providing view prediction insights, estimating the potential engagement each idea could generate based on current YouTube data. By letting AI dictate your content calendar, you ensure that every video you produce is a highly strategic, data-backed winner tailored perfectly to your unique audience.

## Conclusion

Building a successful YouTube channel in 2026 requires more than just a good camera and a charismatic personality; it requires a calculated, data-driven approach. When you combine relentless content consistency with the hard SEO data provided by [vidIQ](https://vidiq.com/Koudi26), explosive channel growth goes from being a distant hope to an absolute mathematical inevitability.

Stop leaving your YouTube success up to chance. [Install the free vidIQ browser extension today](https://vidiq.com/Koudi26), do a quick audit of your channel's existing tags, and discover the hidden keywords that will skyrocket your next video's views!

title: Cheapest Web Hosting for Affiliate Marketing Blogs in 2026

content:
When you are launching your first affiliate marketing blog, it is easy to get sucked into the marketing hype of premium managed hosting providers that charge $30 or $50 per month. While those services are excellent for high-traffic enterprise sites, they are a massive, unnecessary drain on your early profits. As a solopreneur, your goal should be to keep your overhead as low as possible while maintaining a professional, fast-loading aesthetic. Discover the best budget-friendly hosting options for 2026 that offer the perfect balance of performance and price.

## Why Your Hosting Choice Matters for SEO

In 2026, Google's Core Web Vitals are more important than ever. If your budget hosting is so slow that it takes five seconds to load your homepage, your search rankings will suffer regardless of how good your content is. You need a host that provides SSD storage, a built-in CDN, and the latest version of PHP to ensure your site remains snappy and responsive. Fortunately, you no longer have to pay a premium for these essential features.

## The Top 3 Budget Hosts for 2026

### 1. Hostinger: The Value King

[Hostinger](https://hostinger.com?REFERRALCODE=1MOHAMEDKOU05) has consistently dominated the budget hosting space by offering near-premium speeds at entry-level prices. Their "Premium" plan is perfect for affiliate marketers, allowing you to host up to 100 websites with 100GB of fast SSD storage. They also include a free domain for the first year and a one-click WordPress installer that makes setting up your blog a breeze.

> #### Ready to launch your blog?
> [Get 75% Off Hostinger](https://hostinger.com?REFERRALCODE=1MOHAMEDKOU05)
> Use code GROWWITHMED for an extra discount

### 2. Namecheap: The Reliable Underdog

While primarily known for domain registrations, Namecheap's Stellar hosting plans are incredibly robust for the price. They offer unmetered bandwidth and a free website builder, making it a great choice for those who want a simple, no-fuss setup. Their customer support is also top-notch, which is a huge plus for beginners who might run into technical hurdles.

### 3. Bluehost: The WordPress Classic

Bluehost remains a staple in the blogging community for a reason. They are officially recommended by WordPress.org and offer a highly integrated experience. Their "Basic" plan is very affordable and includes a free SSL certificate, which is mandatory for security and SEO in 2026.

## How to Choose the Right Plan

When comparing these budget options, do not just look at the introductory price. Check the renewal rates, as hosting companies often offer a massive discount for the first year that jumps significantly upon renewal. Also, ensure the plan you choose includes automated backups. There is nothing more devastating for a solopreneur than losing months of hard work due to a technical glitch or a security breach.

## Conclusion

You do not need a massive budget to start a professional affiliate marketing blog. By choosing a reliable, budget-friendly host like [Hostinger](https://hostinger.com?REFERRALCODE=1MOHAMEDKOU05), you can keep your initial costs under $50 for the entire year. This allows you to focus your remaining capital on what actually drives revenue: high-quality content and strategic marketing.

Don't let high startup costs stop you from building your digital empire. [Secure your Hostinger plan today](https://hostinger.com?REFERRALCODE=1MOHAMEDKOU05) and have your first affiliate blog live by this afternoon!

title: TubeBuddy Keyword Explorer Tutorial: Rank YouTube Shorts Fast
excerpt: Stop letting your YouTube Shorts die after 48 hours. Learn how to use SEO to rank your Shorts in search and drive evergreen traffic.
author: Med Koudi
metaTitle: TubeBuddy Keyword Explorer Tutorial: Rank YouTube Shorts
metaDescription: Master TubeBuddy Keyword Explorer to rank your YouTube Shorts and drive consistent search traffic to your channel.
metaKeywords: tubebuddy tutorial, youtube shorts seo, keyword explorer, youtube ranking
content:
YouTube Shorts are the fastest way to gain subscribers in 2026, but most creators are doing it wrong. They post a video, hope it hits the "Shorts Shelf," and then watch the views die off after 48 hours. If you want consistent, evergreen traffic from your Shorts, you need to treat them like long-form videos and optimize them for search. This tutorial will show you exactly how to use TubeBuddy's Keyword Explorer to rank your Shorts fast.

## Why Shorts SEO is the Secret to Growth

While the Shorts Feed is great for viral spikes, the YouTube Search index is where long-term channel authority is built. When you rank a Short for a specific search term, it continues to drive views and subscribers for months, even years, after it was published. This creates a foundation of passive traffic that allows your channel to grow even when you are not actively posting.

## Getting Started with TubeBuddy

[TubeBuddy](https://www.tubebuddy.com/pricing?a=growwithmed) is the most comprehensive browser extension for YouTube creators. It provides a suite of tools designed to help you optimize your videos, analyze your competitors, and manage your channel more efficiently. Their Keyword Explorer is the crown jewel of the platform and is essential for any creator serious about ranking in search.

> #### Ready to rank your videos?
> [Install TubeBuddy for Free](https://www.tubebuddy.com/pricing?a=growwithmed)
> The #1 tool for YouTube creators

## The TubeBuddy Keyword Explorer Workflow

### Step 1: Brainstorming Seed Keywords

Open the [TubeBuddy Keyword Explorer](https://www.tubebuddy.com/pricing?a=growwithmed) and type in a broad topic related to your Short. For example, if your Short is about "AI tools," start there. TubeBuddy will give you an overall score, but more importantly, it will show you a list of "Related Searches." These are the specific phrases people are actually typing into the search bar.

### Step 2: Finding the "Weighted" Score

Unlike other tools, TubeBuddy offers a "Weighted" score that is personalized to your specific channel. It looks at your channel's existing authority and tells you how likely *you* are to rank for that keyword. Look for keywords that have a high search volume but a "Very Good" or "Excellent" weighted score for your channel.

### Step 3: Optimizing Your Metadata

Once you have your target keyword, you must place it strategically in your Short's metadata. This includes the first 40 characters of your title, the first two lines of your description, and your tags. TubeBuddy's "SEO Studio" feature can even guide you through this process, giving you a percentage score as you optimize your metadata in real-time.

## Conclusion

Ranking YouTube Shorts is not magic; it is a repeatable process of data-backed optimization. By using [TubeBuddy](https://www.tubebuddy.com/pricing?a=growwithmed) to find the right keywords, you can turn your Shorts into a consistent source of evergreen traffic and subscribers.

[Try TubeBuddy for Free today](https://www.tubebuddy.com/pricing?a=growwithmed) and start ranking your Shorts in search!

title: How to Build an Automated Email Sales Funnel on a Budget
excerpt: Social media algorithms are volatile. Learn how to build a direct line of communication with your audience and generate passive income on autopilot.
author: Med Koudi
metaTitle: Build an Automated Email Sales Funnel on a Budget
metaDescription: Learn how to create a profitable email sales funnel using affordable tools and automation strategies for your digital business.
metaKeywords: email sales funnel, marketing automation, email marketing budget, sales automation
content:
Social media algorithms are notoriously volatile, and relying on them as your sole source of traffic is a dangerous game for any solopreneur. The most successful digital businesses in 2026 are built on a foundation of direct communication: the email list. An automated email sales funnel allows you to build trust with your audience and generate passive income on autopilot. Best of all, you can build a high-converting funnel even on a tight budget.

## The Core Components of a Sales Funnel

A successful funnel consists of three main parts: the Lead Magnet (something free to entice people to join), the Opt-in Page (where they give you their email), and the Automated Sequence (the series of emails that eventually sells your product).

## The Best Budget Tool Stack

### 1. Systeme.io: The All-in-One Solution

For those on a strict budget, [Systeme.io](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535) is the undisputed champion. Their free plan allows you to manage up to 2,000 contacts and build three full sales funnels. It includes email automation, page building, and even course hosting, making it the perfect "business in a box" for beginners.

> #### Ready to build your funnel?
> [Get Started with Systeme.io for Free](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535)
> No credit card required

### 2. Make.com: The Glue

If you prefer to use separate tools for your landing pages and email marketing, [Make.com](https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=growwithmed) is essential for tying them together. You can use it to automatically move leads from a Google Form or a simple Carrd site into your email provider, ensuring your funnel remains completely hands-off.

## Step-by-Step Funnel Setup

### Step 1: Create Your Lead Magnet

Your lead magnet should solve a specific, immediate problem for your target audience. This could be a checklist, a short PDF guide, or a collection of AI prompts. Use Canva to create a professional-looking asset in under an hour.

### Step 2: Build Your Opt-in Page

Using [Systeme.io](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535), select a pre-built template and customize it with your brand's aesthetic. Keep the copy focused on the *benefit* of your lead magnet. The goal is to make the decision to join your list as easy as possible.

### Step 3: Write Your Welcome Sequence

Your first email should deliver the lead magnet immediately. The following 3-5 emails should provide additional value, share your story, and eventually introduce your paid product or affiliate offer. Automation ensures these emails are sent at the perfect intervals after someone joins your list.

## Conclusion

Building an automated sales funnel is the single best investment you can make in your digital business. It turns your traffic into a long-term asset and provides the stability that social media cannot. [Start your free Systeme.io account today](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535) and build your first funnel by the end of the day!

title: Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels 2026: Which Wins? | Grow With Med
excerpt: Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels — which funnel builder wins in 2026? Compare pricing, features, and ease of use. Start free with Systeme.io today.
author: Med
metaTitle: Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels 2026: Which Wins? | Grow With Med
metaDescription: Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels — which funnel builder wins in 2026? Compare pricing, features, and ease of use. Start free today →
metaKeywords: Systeme.io, ClickFunnels, funnel builder, solopreneur tools
content:
# Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels 2026: Why Solopreneurs Are Switching

![Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels 2026 price comparison — $0 free plan vs $97 per month funnel builder](https://store.ba9chich.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/A_clean_modern_202604060103.jpg)

What if I told you that one of the best funnel builders on the market costs **$0 per month** — and the other costs **$97**?

That's exactly the situation solopreneurs face in 2026 when comparing **Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels**. Both tools help you build sales funnels, sell products, and grow your online business. But they serve very different people at very different price points.

This post is for creators, affiliate marketers, and solopreneurs who are tired of overpaying for tools they barely use. Whether you're just starting your first funnel or you're scaling an established business, I'll break down everything you need to know — features, pricing, honest pros and cons, and a clear verdict on which tool is actually worth your money in 2026.

Let's get into it.

---

## What Is Systeme.io?

![Systeme.io all-in-one funnel builder dashboard on laptop — free marketing platform for solopreneurs](https://store.ba9chich.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Laptop_mockup_on_202604060103.jpeg)

Systeme.io is an all-in-one online business platform built specifically for creators and solopreneurs who want to launch fast without juggling ten different tools. It was founded by Aurélien Amacker and has grown into one of the most popular free marketing platforms in the world.

With Systeme.io, you can:

- Build sales funnels and landing pages
- Send unlimited email campaigns
- Host and sell online courses
- Run an affiliate program
- Set up automation workflows
- Sell digital and physical products

The tool is designed to replace your entire marketing stack — no need for a separate email tool, course platform, or funnel builder.

### Systeme.io Free Plan

Here's where it gets interesting. Systeme.io's **free plan is genuinely free** — no credit card required, no time limit. It includes:

- Up to **2,000 contacts**
- **Unlimited email sends**
- **3 sales funnels**
- 1 course, 1 blog, and 1 automation rule
- Access to the affiliate program

For a solopreneur just starting out, this free plan can realistically run your entire business for months before you need to upgrade.

👉 Want a deeper look? Read our [full Systeme.io review →](/reviews/systeme-io)

---

## What Is ClickFunnels?

ClickFunnels is the OG of funnel builders — launched in 2014 by Russell Brunson, it essentially invented the "sales funnel" category for online entrepreneurs. It's powerful, polished, and has one of the most active communities in the online business space.

ClickFunnels is built for marketers who want high-converting, drag-and-drop funnel pages with advanced features like:

- Multi-step funnels with upsells and downsells
- A/B split testing
- Webinar funnels
- A large library of proven templates
- Deep integration with third-party CRMs and email tools

### ClickFunnels Pricing

ClickFunnels starts at **$97/month** for the basic plan. Their ClickFunnels 2.0 suite goes up to $297/month for the full feature set. There is a 14-day free trial, but no permanent free tier.

For solopreneurs or beginners, that's a significant monthly commitment — especially before you've made your first dollar online.

---

## Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels — Feature Comparison

![Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels feature comparison checklist — email marketing, funnels, courses, and affiliate program](https://store.ba9chich.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Infographic_tool_comparison_202604060104-1.jpeg)

| Feature | Systeme.io | ClickFunnels |
|---|---|---|
| **Price** | Free forever / Paid from $27/mo | From $97/month |
| **Free Plan** | ✅ Yes (2,000 contacts) | ❌ No (14-day trial only) |
| **Funnels** | 3 (free) / Unlimited (paid) | Unlimited (all plans) |
| **Email Marketing** | ✅ Built-in, unlimited sends | ❌ Requires integration |
| **Online Courses** | ✅ Built-in | ✅ Built-in (2.0) |
| **Affiliate Program** | ✅ Built-in on free plan | ✅ Available |
| **Ease of Use** | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Very beginner-friendly | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Moderate learning curve |
| **Best For** | Beginners, solopreneurs, budget-conscious creators | Established businesses, advanced marketers |

---

## Where ClickFunnels Still Wins

Let's be honest — ClickFunnels isn't overpriced for nothing. There are real areas where it pulls ahead.

**1. Advanced A/B Split Testing**
ClickFunnels has more robust and granular A/B testing features, making it better for businesses that are optimizing funnels at scale and need statistically significant data fast.

**2. Larger Community and Ecosystem**
The ClickFunnels community is enormous — think active Facebook groups, FunnelHackers events, tons of third-party courses, and a massive library of shared funnel templates. If peer learning and networking matter to you, ClickFunnels wins.

**3. Deeper Third-Party Integrations**
ClickFunnels integrates natively with more CRMs, payment processors, and advanced marketing tools. If you're running a complex business stack with tools like Salesforce, HubSpot, or Infusionsoft, ClickFunnels will plug in more cleanly.

---

## Where Systeme.io Dominates

![Solopreneur building a sales funnel online using free marketing platform tools in a home office](https://store.ba9chich.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Young_solopreneur_working_202604060104.jpeg)

For the majority of solopreneurs and content creators, Systeme.io doesn't just compete — it wins outright.

**1. The Price Is Unbeatable**
A free funnel builder that actually works is a game-changer. Systeme.io's free plan lets you validate your business idea, build your list, and make your first sales without spending a single dollar on tools. When you're ready to scale, paid plans start at just $27/month — less than a third of ClickFunnels' entry price.

**2. Everything Is Built In**
Email marketing, courses, funnels, automation, affiliate management — it's all in one dashboard. That means no duct-taping tools together, no extra monthly fees, and no workflow breakdowns because two apps stopped syncing. For a solopreneur running everything solo, this simplicity is gold.

**3. Perfect for Beginners and Digital Product Sellers**
If you're selling an ebook, a Notion template, an AI prompt pack, or a mini-course, Systeme.io has everything you need to set up a complete sales system in under an hour. The learning curve is minimal, the UI is clean, and the free plan gives you enough runway to actually start making money before upgrading.

---

## Real Verdict — Which Should You Choose?

![Systeme.io wins vs ClickFunnels in 2026 — best funnel builder for solopreneurs and beginners](https://store.ba9chich.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Trophy_with_Systeme.io_202604060104.jpeg)

Here's the honest truth, broken down simply:

**Choose Systeme.io if you are:**
- A beginner or early-stage solopreneur
- Selling digital products, courses, or affiliate offers
- Working with a tight budget (or no budget)
- Looking for one tool that does everything
- Building your first funnel or email list

**Choose ClickFunnels if you are:**
- An established business with consistent revenue
- Running high-volume funnels that need deep A/B testing
- Already integrated into the ClickFunnels ecosystem
- Willing to pay a premium for community access and advanced features

For 95% of the people reading this, **Systeme.io is the smarter move in 2026**. The free plan alone is more powerful than most paid tools on the market. You can launch, grow, and monetize your entire business without spending a dollar — and upgrade only when your revenue justifies it.

ClickFunnels is a great tool, but it's built for a different stage of business. Paying $97/month before you've made $97 online is a mindset trap that keeps beginners stuck.

---

## How to Get Started with Systeme.io for Free

Getting started takes less than 10 minutes. Here's how:

1. **Create your free account** — Go to [Systeme.io](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535), sign up with your email, and get instant access to your dashboard. No credit card needed.

2. **Build your first funnel** — Use one of the pre-built funnel templates to set up a landing page, thank-you page, and email opt-in. Customize with your branding, offer, and copy.

3. **Connect your product and launch** — Add your digital product or affiliate link, set up a simple email automation, and hit publish. Your funnel is live.

That's it. You're now running a real online business with a real funnel — for free.

**[Try Systeme.io Free →](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa0140081910bbe4c0e3a0bcc243f26de05a0a3535)**

---

## Conclusion

The **Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels** debate has a pretty clear winner for solopreneurs in 2026: Systeme.io gives you more value, more tools, and a free forever plan that ClickFunnels simply can't match. Unless you're running a high-scale operation that specifically needs ClickFunnels' advanced features, there's no good reason to pay $97/month when Systeme.io does the job for $0.

Start free, build your funnel, and grow.

👉 [Browse all marketing tools and reviews →](/reviews)

---

💡 **Want to automate your entire funnel with AI prompts?**
Check out the **AI Plus Bundle 2.0** — done-for-you AI prompt packs designed to write your funnel copy, email sequences, and content strategy in minutes. **[Get the AI Plus Bundle 2.0 →](https://growwithmed.gumroad.com/l/AllinOneAIBundle?layout=profile)**

---

## FAQ — Systeme.io vs ClickFunnels

### Is Systeme.io really free forever?

Yes. Systeme.io's free plan has no time limit and no credit card requirement. It includes 2,000 contacts, unlimited email sends, 3 funnels, 1 course, and access to the affiliate program. You only need to upgrade if you grow beyond those limits — which is a good problem to have.

### Can Systeme.io replace ClickFunnels completely?

For most solopreneurs and digital product sellers, yes. Systeme.io covers all the core functionality: funnel building, email marketing, course hosting, affiliate management, and automation. The only cases where ClickFunnels pulls ahead are advanced A/B testing and its larger third-party integration library.

### Which is better for beginners?

Systeme.io is significantly better for beginners. The interface is cleaner, the learning curve is lower, and the free plan removes all financial risk. ClickFunnels has a steeper learning curve and a $97/month price tag that's hard to justify when you're just starting out.

### Does Systeme.io have an affiliate program?

Yes, and it's one of the best in the industry. Systeme.io offers **40% recurring commissions** on all paid plans — meaning you earn every month as long as your referral stays subscribed. You can access the affiliate program even on the free plan.
